response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development but lacks the specific C++ Windows development experience required for this role. While they have experience with C and C++ components, their recent work focuses heavily on Node.js, TypeScript, and other languages, with no clear evidence of deep C++ Windows system development in the last 10 years. Domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income is also missing.
strengths: Strong general software development background with experience in multiple languages and frameworks
Proven ability to work in team environments and adopt modern development practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Demonstrated problem-solving skills and adaptability across different domains
concerns: Lacks recent and substantial C++ Windows development experience (mandatory skill)
No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle database experience (mandatory skill)
No domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking
